title: “I Saw Alien Technology At A Military Base!” (Ft. Randy Anderson)
summary: Green Beret Randy Anderson describes being taken to a secret underground facility called the 'Offworld Technology Division' at Naval Surface Warfare Center Crane in March 2014, where he claims to have witnessed exotic technology including a levitating metallic sphere allegedly recovered from a crashed craft. He also discusses his work at Area 51/Nevada Test Site where he witnessed unexplained phenomena including green orbs.

acronyms.definition: Official UFO investigation program under Harry Reid, run by Lou Elizondo
A secure facility like a Faraday cage where classified communications take place offline
Program requiring nuclear personnel to report any medications and maintain strict mental health standards
Unified combatant command for special operations forces
Legal agreement preventing disclosure of classified information
Military discharge document recording service history

key_claims.claim: A levitating metallic basketball-sized sphere was displayed at an underground facility at Naval Surface Warfare Center Crane labeled 'Offworld Technology'
The sphere was allegedly recovered from a crashed craft and described as a control mechanism that interacted with consciousness
US drone technology is significantly more advanced than publicly known
There are drones that can disguise themselves to look like ordinary things including birds
A green orb was witnessed flying over Area 51/Nevada Test Site, and personnel indicated this required significant paperwork if reported
Randy Anderson has seen a black triangle employing exotic electrogravitic propulsion at Area 51
The US and probably China have cracked anti-gravity in laboratory settings
Bob Lazar may have been a 'limited hangout' person providing frameworks to identify and recruit talented individuals
Jimmy Carter stated a remote viewer named Rosemary Smith located a downed Russian TU-22 spy plane in Africa within a 3 square mile radius
